flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Mississippi University for Women vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.6k vs 2.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mississippi University for Women fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Mississippi University for Women fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (75.1% → 67.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Mississippi University for Women vs the 2018–2022 baseline (37.8% vs 43.0%).
